commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SET_HW_RSRC
commands.purpose: This is the first API that KMD submits to MES during initialization.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_ADD_QUEUE
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to add a use queue into the scheduler's internal structure to schedule it

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_AMD_LOG
commands.purpose: Copy MES_SCH_CONTEXT to AMGLOG specified memory location for TDR analysis.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_REMOVE_QUEUE
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to remove a user queue from the scheduler's internal structure.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SET_SCHEDULING_CONFIG
commands.purpose: Corresponds to Windows DDI DxgkDdiSetProrityBands.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_PERFORM_YIELD
commands.purpose: This API is not currently supported.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SET_GANG_PRIORITY_LEVEL
commands.purpose: This API is not currently supported.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SUSPEND
commands.purpose: When MES_SCH_API_SET_HW_RSRC.legacy_sch_mode is set, the KMD uses this API to

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_RESUME
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to resume a single queue suspended by MES_SCH_API_SUSPEND, or

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_RESET
commands.purpose: In Windows, the KMD uses this API for hang detection and reset. The MES scheduler returns a

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SET_LOG_BUFFER
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to save log buffer information passed from Windows OS DDI

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_CHANGE_GANG_PRORITY
commands.purpose: In the Windows use-case, this API corresponds to DDI

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_QUERY_SCHEDULER_STATUS
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to query status/info from MES firmware.

commands.name: MES_API_QUERY_MES__GET_CTX_ARRAY_SIZE
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this to query MES internal structure size.

commands.name: MES_API_QUERY_MES__HEALTHY_CHECK
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to check if MES is running and responding.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_PROGRAM_GDS
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to request MES for GDS programming for the target process. GDS

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SET_DEBUG_VMID
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to set up the page table for a process that requests debug VMID for

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_UPDATE_ROOT_PAGE_TABLE
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to change page table base of a process.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SET_SE_MODE
commands.purpose: The API allows the driver to turn off the second shader engine.

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_SET_GANG_SUBMIT
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to pair two queues together for the purpose of gang submission. MES

commands.name: MES_SCH_API_MISC
commands.purpose: This API contains miscellaneous non-scheduling functionalities. Each functionality has a sub-

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__WRITE_REG
commands.purpose: Perform register write on request of KMD.

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__INV_GART
commands.purpose: Perform GART invalidation.

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__QUERY_STATUS
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this to trigger an interrupt from KIQ.

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__READ_REG
commands.purpose: Perform register read on request of the KMD.

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__WAIT_REG_MEM
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to request for the MES to wait on specific register values.

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__SET_SHADER_DEBUGGER
commands.purpose: This API enables shader debugger register programming.

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__NOTIFY_WORK_ON_UNMAPPED_QUEUE
commands.purpose: KMD uses this API as a workaround for aggregate doorbell. Meant to be called when an

commands.name: MESAPI_MISC__NOTIFY_TO_UNMAP_PROCESSES
commands.purpose: The KMD uses this API to request the MES to unmap queues for all processes.
